title: Athyrium aphanoneuron
taxonomy: Athyrium aphanoneuron is classified within the family Woodsiaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns. This classification places it in the order Polypodiales, which contains various types of ferns. At the family level, Athyrium aphanoneuron is further grouped with other ferns in the family Woodsiaceae. It is also a member of the genus Athyrium, which contains a variety of fern species. Further classification places Athyrium aphanoneuron within the kingdom Plantae, as a vascular plant.
